Summary of the Query:
The query asks whether the films "Crazy Love" and "Welcome to Nollywood" were both released in 2008.

Skills and Tools:
1. Research Skills: To determine the release years of the films.
2. Web Search Tools: To find reliable information about film release dates.

- Research Skills: To identify the necessary information to answer the query.
- Web Search Tools: To find accurate release dates for the specified films.

How Tools Help:

- Wikipedia_RAG_Search_Tool: Can search Wikipedia for detailed information on film releases, including accurate dates.

Additional Considerations:
- Verify information from multiple sources for accuracy.
- Use the results from the web search tools to cross-reference and confirm the release dates.
</answer>

result:
Neither "Crazy Love" nor "Welcome to Nollywood" had their initial release dates in 2008.

"Crazy Love," a documentary film, was released on June 1, 2007[1](https://tv.apple.com/us/movie/crazy-love/umc.cmc.5mnt7ionnsn09283ew5qlv4nu), [2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Crazy_Love_(2007_film)), [3](https://www.filmaffinity.com/en/film291247.html). It was screened at the New Zealand International Film Festival in 2008[4](https://www.nziff.co.nz/2008/archive/crazy-love/).

"Welcome to Nollywood," a documentary about the Nigerian film industry, was first released on April 12, 2007[5](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Welcome_to_Nollywood). Although it premiered at film festivals in 2007[5](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Welcome_to_Nollywood), [6](https://store.cinemaguild.com/nontheatrical/product/2277.html), [7](https://africanfilmny.org/films/welcome-to-nollywood/), [8](https://www.fullframefest.org/film/welcome-to-nollywood/), it had a PBS broadcast in 2008[7](https://africanfilmny.org/films/welcome-to-nollywood/). Additionally, one source lists August 17, 2008, without further specification of the type of release[9](https://www.rottentomatoes.com/m/welcome_to_nollywood).

The results indicated that "Crazy Love," a documentary film, was released on June 1, 2007, and "Welcome to Nollywood," a documentary about the Nigerian film industry, was first released on April 12, 2007, with a PBS broadcast in 2008.

Answer: No, "Crazy Love" and "Welcome to Nollywood" were not both released in 2008. "Crazy Love" was released in 2007, and "Welcome to Nollywood" had its initial release in 2007 with a PBS broadcast in 2008.
</answer>
